description: Style NoteCreated for the woman of sophistication, this sandal from catwalk is crafted with high quality synthetic leather to offer unparalleled comfort and is uniquely designed to give your feet that urban touche.Heel: 2"Product DetailsBlack sandal with shimmery transparent plastic criss- cross forefoot and midfoot straps An elasticated ankle strap for a snug FitSmooth footbed with embossed brandingTPU outsoleShort heelMaterial and CareWipe with damp cloth to remove dust
